Home.heroTitle: Horizon One: The Market-Leading Virtual Integrated Test Solution
Home.heroSubtitle: We focus on high-growth areas such as automotive and satellite communications, solving our customers' most pressing testing challenges with integrated software and hardware solutions that merge deterministic channels with standardized models.
Home.hyperRtDescription: The core of our platform, providing high-fidelity, real-time ray-tracing for the most demanding simulation scenarios.
Home.raysenseDescription: A series of portable, high-resolution sensing instruments designed to capture the ground truth of wireless environments.
Home.csiSensingDescription: Leverage Channel State Information (CSI) for high-precision positioning and environmental sensing applications.
Home.virtualDriveTestDescription: Reduce the cost and complexity of physical drive tests by recreating real-world scenarios in the lab.
Home.mimoOtaDescription: Our software solution for MIMO OTA testing, enabling accurate and repeatable performance evaluation of wireless devices.

MetaSim.aboutDescription: MetaSim is a state-of-the-art simulation platform designed for the next generation of wireless networks. It leverages real-world measurement data to create digital twins of complex RF environments, enabling highly accurate performance prediction and network optimization.
MetaSim.feature3: Support for 5G NR, Wi-Fi 6/7, and custom waveforms
MetaSim.feature5: Comprehensive API for automation and integration

RaySense.aboutDescription: RaySense is a portable, high-resolution RF channel sounder designed to capture the ground truth of wireless environments. It provides the critical measurement data that powers our Measurement-Validated Simulation (MVS) workflow, ensuring that simulations accurately reflect reality.
RaySense.feature3: Portable and ruggedized for field measurements
RaySense.feature5: Automated data processing and channel parameter extraction

Layout.title: Metaradio.tech
Layout.description: Measurement-Validated Simulation: Bringing Ground Truth to Your Wireless Network
